# Taali

> Taali is the agentic hiring platform for AI-native engineering teams. An autonomous recruiting agent runs your hiring pipeline 24/7 within a budget you set, and AI-native assessments score how candidates actually use AI on the job — with a human approving every consequential decision.

Taali combines two things no other hiring tool puts together:

- **Agentic hiring** — an autonomous AI agent triages, pre-screens, scores, and queues advances or rejects across your open roles continuously. It paces itself within a monthly budget and pauses to ask you whenever a decision needs human judgment. The agent recommends; you decide.
- **AI-native assessments** — instead of banning AI, Taali puts candidates in a real, browser-based workspace with AI tools in hand, the way engineers ship today. It captures every prompt, paste, edit, and test run, and scores AI collaboration and AI fluency as a first-class dimension alongside code craft.

## Key facts

- Taali is an agentic hiring platform — recruiting run by an autonomous, budget-bounded AI agent with a human in the loop on every consequential call.
- Taali is an AI-native assessment platform — it measures how well candidates use AI on the job, not whether they can code without it.
- AI fluency is scored across five dimensions — the 5 Ds: delegation, description, discernment, diligence, and the deliverable.
- Every assessment produces a prompt-by-prompt session replay and a candidate standing report scored on the 5 Ds.
- Candidates work on real, role-relevant tasks in a live IDE with a terminal and real AI tools.

## Definitions

- **Agentic hiring**: recruiting performed by an autonomous AI agent that works the pipeline continuously within a set budget and defers to a human for consequential decisions.
- **AI-native assessment**: a technical assessment that gives candidates AI tools in a real workspace and scores how effectively they use them, rather than prohibiting AI.
- **AI-native hiring**: hiring designed for the AI era — the recruiting workflow is run by an AI agent and candidates are evaluated on how well they work with AI.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.taali.ai/): overview of agentic hiring and AI-native assessments.
- [Product walkthrough](https://www.taali.ai/demo): an interactive, no-signup walkthrough of the agent and the assessment runtime.
- [Book a demo](https://www.taali.ai/demo-lead): request a 20-minute demo run on a role of yours.
- [Agentic hiring guide](https://www.taali.ai/agentic-hiring): how governed recruiting agents run the routine funnel while people retain consequential calls.
- [AI-native assessment guide](https://www.taali.ai/ai-native-assessments): how Taali measures the five dimensions of real AI collaboration.
- [Developer portal](https://www.taali.ai/developers): public API authentication, scopes, endpoints, errors, and webhooks.
- [Taali blog](https://www.taali.ai/blog): research and practical guidance on AI-native work and hiring.
- [Privacy notice](https://www.taali.ai/privacy): how Taali handles account, workspace, candidate, assessment, integration, usage, and billing data.
- [Terms of service](https://www.taali.ai/terms): terms governing access to and use of Taali.
